commentary_text: The model favors Iran at 48%, while the sportsbook consensus favors Egypt at 39%. On the draw, the market sits 5 percentage points higher than the model. These divergences could reflect differences in how each source weights recent form, injury status, or lineup availability—categories where the model may lack current information that real-money markets price in. The dashboard surfaces this substantial disagreement on which team is likeliest to prevail as a signal worth monitoring, without resolving which view is correct.
